title: The MegaStorm
description: Enter the eye of the Storm, this is an Cobblemon datapack that adds Mega Evolutions to Pokémon that deserve, need, or just don't have one.
body:
![The Megastorm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e4520e3976ee0b351a01c6f5820ab77f81a4597.png) [Join My Discord](https://discord.gg/UQsZAmttrN) for bug reports and more. Join discord for recipes and faster updates to what is getting added. If link doesn't work add me. - Discord: killtheace The Megastorm is a Cobblemon datapack that adds new Mega Evolutions to cobblemon. It focuses entirely giving Pokémon Mega Evolutions. Started by [Necronyx(me)](https://modrinth.com/user/Necronyx), The Megastorm is perfect for people who want to expand their teams with megas and experience the thrill of new fan-made Mega Evolutions from my community and me in Minecraft. # Mega Evolutions We Have!
Mega Typhlosion
![Mega Typhlosion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32afa5a7fc0db72445581cd8eb3640fab1aa82cc_0.webp) ## Stats: ### Typing = Fire ### Ability = Flash Fire - HP = 88 - Atk = 104 - Def = 88 - SpA = 140 - SpD = 105 - Spd = 109 ## Stone Recipe: ![Typhlosionite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f92be012103087cd106a4bca78577fdd72b961a2.png) ### Credits: [Necronyx](https://modrinth.com/user/Necronyx) for art and model
Mega Luxray(coming soon (all info isnt final here))
![Mega Luxray](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04720423effe53380c835b47f6dbe37cba289303.png) ## Stats: ### Typing = Electric/psychic ### Ability = Levitate - HP = 80 - Atk = 140 - Def = 110 - SpA = 80 - SpD = 90 - Spd = 130 ## Stone Recipe: ![Flygonite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eeda27f830704f5f05eb065af9344b6872fca71.png) ### Credits: [Necronyx](https://modrinth.com/user/Necronyx) for art and model
Mega Walrein
![Mega Walrein](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/829f96a1eff75436519c7c00dc1fd7f652889e30_0.webp) ## Stats: ### Typing = Ice/Water ### Ability = Polar Fortitude - HP = 120 - Atk = 80 - Def = 105 - SpA = 140 - SpD = 105 - Spd = 80 ## Stone Recipe: ![Walreinite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c01c6c368a1045bd90050661eacc42ad335d788.png) ### Credits: [User_JJ](https://modrinth.com/user/User_JJ) for model
Mega Noivern
![Mega Noivern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/808a993b0e5801ee0feb6bf3b0789f278fa50577_0.webp) ## Stats: ### Typing = Dragon/Psychic ### Ability = Luminaria Wings - HP = 90 - Atk = 80 - Def = 90 - SpA = 160 - SpD = 95 - Spd = 120 ## Stone Recipe: ![Noivernite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/770f26796bf44d74cc4a3b25ff343ce362b872b7.png) ### Credits: [User_JJ](https://modrinth.com/user/User_JJ) for model
Mega Decidueye(coming soon)
## Stats: ### Typing = ### Ability = - HP = - Atk = - Def = - SpA = - SpD = - Spd = ## Stone Recipe: ### Credits:
Mega Incineroar(coming soon)
## Stats: ### Typing = ### Ability = - HP = - Atk = - Def = - SpA = - SpD = - Spd = ## Stone Recipe: ### Credits:
Mega Primarina(coming soon)
## Stats: ### Typing = ### Ability = - HP = - Atk = - Def = - SpA = - SpD = - Spd = ## Stone Recipe: ### Credits:
# New Abilities We Have!
Polar Fortitude
## Description: Its frigid hide halves the damage from Ice, Fire, Electric, and Water-type attacks. ## Short Description: Halves damage from Ice, Fire, Electric, and Water-type attacks. ### The Megas: Mega Walrein
Luminaria Wings
## Description: Its luminous wings and powerful echos nullify dark type moves as well as keep it up in the air. ## Short Description: Nullifies Dark-type and Ground-type attacks. ### The Megas: Mega Noivern
